first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations (4/10), and the core reasoning remains unchanged. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's lack of Director-level strategic experience and deep AI expertise as the primary reasons for the low score. The minor differences in the phrasing of strengths and concerns are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any penalty or altered perception based on the change of job locations from Western cities to Kenya.
